description_long: This lamp features a tall, slender pole supporting a wide, conical lamp head with a slightly flared rim. The lamp head appears to be made of a dark, opaque material on the exterior, with a translucent section beneath the rim that likely serves as the light diffuser. The pole is straight and uniform in thickness, suggesting a sturdy metal construction suitable for outdoor environments. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible decorative embellishments or complex structural elements. The lamp is likely intended for use in public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas, providing ambient lighting over a broad area. Its proportions and materials indicate durability and resistance to weather conditions.
description: A tall, modern outdoor lamp with a conical head and slender pole, featuring a translucent diffuser beneath a dark, flared rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the lamp, with the conical head and straight pole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniform thickness of the pole and the symmetrical lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the same conical head and pole structure visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lamp's symmetry and minimalist design.
